result.summary: Found 2 issues: a major content mismatch and a major text truncation problem in the navigation.

issues.description: The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section header displays '0 Games' but shows 6 game tiles below it, creating a visual contradiction
issues.suggestion: Update the game counter to reflect the actual number of displayed games, or hide the games if the count should be 0

issues.description: Navigation tab text 'Hot Gar...' is truncated and cut off, likely should read 'Hot Games'
issues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation tab width or font size to allow full text display without truncation
